## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/task. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

## Related Task
* Registry Task: `TASKS.md` Task ID (e.g. `1.1`): #______
* Closes Issue: #______

## Contributor Information
* **Contributor Name / Github Username**: 
* **Role Assigned**:
  - [ ] **Role 1 (Feature Adder)**: I implemented a new feature or task.
  - [ ] **Role 2 (Bug Fixer / Verifier)**: I reviewed, tested, and/or fixed a Role 1 contribution.

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] **feat**: New feature (no breaking changes)
- [ ] **fix**: Bug fix (no breaking changes)
- [ ] **refactor**: Code reorganization/optimization (no structural behavior change)
- [ ] **docs**: Documentation only
- [ ] **style**: Code formatting changes (spaces, formatting, semicolons)
- [ ] **test**: Add missing tests or fix broken tests
- [ ] **breaking**: Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Verification & Testing
How did you verify these changes? Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Automated Tests**: List tests run (e.g., `pytest tests/test_auth.py` or `npm run test`)
- [ ] **Manual Verification**: Describe manual checks, UI screenshots, or API client responses (attach media if relevant)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the **Strict Modularity Rule** (features are separated into dedicated, single-purpose files and imported cleanly).
- [ ] I have registered my name and updated the task status in [TASKS.md](file:///c:/Users/anshul%20prajapati/OneDrive/Desktop/OPEN-SOURCE_FINDING_AI/TASKS.md).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md`, `docs/architecture.md`, `docs/setup.md`) if applicable.
